name: Union Square Cafe Black Bean Soup with Lemon and Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight for at least 6 hours.
2. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
3. Rinse beans and place them in a pot with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then drain.
4. Place beans in a Dutch oven with carrots, onions, celery, garlic, thyme, and bacon. Cover with 2 quarts of water and add salt and pepper. Bring to a boil and cover.
5. Place the pot in the oven and cook for 4 hours.
6. Puree the beans using a blender with some of the liquid.
7. Adjust seasoning to taste.
8. To serve, dip one side of lemon slices in minced parsley and float the parsley-side up in each bowl. Add about 1/4 ounce of dry sherry before serving.
